title: Delicate Lamb Doner Kebab
description: A classic Turkish dish made with thinly sliced lamb, served with a side of warm pita bread and your choice of toppings.

ingredients.name: Delicate Doner Kebab seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Doner Kebab seasoning blend and lemon juice.
Add the lamb strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Grill the lamb for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5 minutes.
Assemble the kebabs by placing a few slices of lamb onto each pita bread, topped with red onion, tomato, and parsley.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
